# EntraExportPhotos - Project Setup Instructions

## Project Overview
EntraExportPhotos is a Python project for exporting photos from Entra ID (Azure AD).

## Setup Checklist

- [ ] Verify copilot-instructions.md exists
- [ ] Project Requirements Clarified
- [ ] Project Scaffolded
- [ ] Project Customized
- [ ] Required Extensions Installed
- [ ] Project Compiled/Validated
- [ ] Tasks Created
- [ ] Project Launched
- [ ] Documentation Complete

## Getting Started

This is a Python project. To get started:

1. Ensure Python 3.8+ is installed
2. Create and activate a virtual environment
3. Install dependencies: `pip install -r requirements.txt`
4. Run the application from the `src` directory

## Project Structure

```
EntraExportPhotos/
├── .github/
│   └── copilot-instructions.md
├── .vscode/
│   └── tasks.json
├── src/
│   └── main.py
├── requirements.txt
├── README.md
└── .gitignore
```
